title: cogswellia farinosa
intro: Cogswellia farinosa, also known as the sweet alyssum or madwort, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cogswellia farinosa include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Cogswellia farinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and calmness.
